text:
$1,200 pending since April 6 and past what you were expecting is worth a direct look — I'm escalating this to our payments ops team to check the status. ACH doesn't process on weekends, so any Saturday or Sunday in that window can add a day, but six days warrants someone checking directly.

Send the last 4 digits of the receiving account and they can track it down. They'll follow up with what they find.

Novig Support
